item.title: About
item.description: Hi! My name is Maud and I work as a research scientist (postdoctoral fellow) in the field of experimental psychology, with a focus on mental health, wellbeing and decision-making. In 2021 I want to start a new career journey as a data analyst / data scientist and use my analytical skills to support evidence-based practices and drive positive change. I have always been a very curious person. This is what originally led me to science and is why I am passionate about travelling and exploring different cultures and cuisines.

item.title: Projects
item.description: My new year’s resolution for 2021 was to invest more time in playing around with data visualization techniques. Here you find a sample of data visualizations that I have produced for personal projects. Stay tuned for more to come!

item.title: CV
item.description: I am a research-trained, client-centric professional with 10 years of experience in psychological research, in the areas of mental health, wellbeing and decision-making. I am data- and impact-driven. I like to work in a dynamic and socially responsible environment where my work has a direct positive impact. Skills and Competencies Data analytics — Software and programming skills for data collection (e.g. Qualtrics, LimeSurvey, python), data analysis and visualization (e.g. R, python), and database management (Excel, MySQL).

item.title: publications
item.description: You can also find me on Google Scholar and ResearchGate. My ORCID ID is 0000-0001-9933-4569. Preprints Grol, M., Cásedas, L., Oomen, D., Spronk, D., & Fox, E. (2020, December 23). Uncontrolled Eating in Healthy Women Has Limited Influence on Food Reward Sensitivity and Food-Related Inhibitory Control. PsyArXiv. doi: https://doi.org/10.31234/osf.io/an7se Peer-reviewed Publications 2020 Twivy, E., Grol, M., & Fox, E. (2020). Individual differences in affective flexibility predict future anxiety and worry.

I’m Maud, a researcher based in Berlin. Trained in experimental psychology, I have a background in working with real-world datasets and using advanced statistical methods. I love analyzing and visualizing data to make better and informed decisions. Learn more about me

item.title: Analyse
item.description: I am experienced in analyzing data and clearly present results in reproducible reports. My favourite language for all data-related tasks is R, but I have also used python in smaller projects.

item.title: Collect
item.description: I have extensive experience with data collection methods such as survey design, A/B testing and semi-structured interviews. I have worked with a.o. Qualtrics, LimeSurvey and python to collect and process data.

item.title: Visualize
item.description: Visually presenting data helps to provide a quick and clear understanding of the information I have mostly used open source tools R/shiny to create static infographics and interactive dashboards.
